series_metadata.series_description: Sales ratio reports provide statistical data pertaining to sales of real estate in Ohio''''''''s counties and are used for real property assessment equalization by the Ohio Department of Taxation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Sales ratio reports prepared sexennial reappraisals are be maintained by Ohio Department of Taxation June 1 of year following next sexennial reappraisal ; Paper: Sales ratio reports prepared sexennial reappraisals are be maintained by Ohio Department of Taxation June 1 of year following next sexennial reappraisal
